name: ai-trading-agent-tutorial
description: Reusable AI trading agent template with on-chain identity (ERC-8004), Kraken execution, and EIP-712 verified explainability

scripts.deploy: npm run preflight:deploy && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:sepolia: npm run preflight:deploy:sepolia && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network sepolia -- --verify
scripts.register: npm run preflight:register:sepolia && npx ts-node scripts/register-agent.ts
scripts.register:sepolia: npm run preflight:register:sepolia && npx ts-node scripts/register-agent.ts
scripts.claim: npm run preflight:claim && npx ts-node scripts/claim.ts
scripts.allocate-sandbox: npm run preflight:run-agent && npx ts-node scripts/allocate-sandbox-capital.ts
scripts.run-agent: npm run preflight:run-agent && npx ts-node scripts/run-agent.ts
